files.patch:
@@ -1,39 +0,0 @@
-# =============================================================================
-# Vibe Insights Environment Variables
-# =============================================================================
-# This file shows environment variable structure.
-# Actual values are configured per-package:
-#   - Server: packages/server/.dev.vars (for Wrangler)
-#   - Web: VITE_* variables in this file (for Vite)
-#   - Plugin: Environment variables from shell
-# =============================================================================
-
-# Web App (Vite)
-VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8787
-
-# Plugin Configuration (set in your shell)
-# These are read by the Claude Code plugin at runtime
-# VI_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:8787
-# VI_API_TOKEN=dev_token
-# VI_UPLOAD_ENABLED=true
-
-# Development
-NODE_ENV=development
-
-# =============================================================================
-# Server Configuration
-# =============================================================================
-# Server environment variables are configured in:
-#   packages/server/.dev.vars (local development)
-#   wrangler secrets (production)
-#
-# Required variables:
-#   - API_TOKEN: Bearer token for plugin authentication
-#   - GITHUB_CLIENT_ID: GitHub OAuth app client ID
-#   - GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET: GitHub OAuth app client secret
-#   - BETTER_AUTH_SECRET: Secret for session encryption (generate with: openssl rand -base64 32)
-#   - BETTER_AUTH_URL: Your server URL (http://localhost:8787 for local)
-#
-# See packages/server/.dev.vars.example for template
-# See AUTH_SETUP.md for complete setup guide
-# =============================================================================
